pr.title: GatedAttn + ValueResid + XSA6 + HedgeMixer + Legal TTT — val_bpb: 1.08965 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Adds per-head gated scaling and per-block value residual injection to HedgeMixer while keeping control scalars in FP32 for quantization safety.
techniques: Per-head FP32 gate scaling of attention outputs
Per-block FP32 scalar injecting initial embedding into residual stream
Control scalars registered to bypass GPTQ quantization
